limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-attributable spend, headcount, or named AI programs disclosed in the excerpts; AI references are risk/governance-oriented rather than investment-oriented. Score of 2 reflects generic acknowledgment of AI as a competitive trend without named programs or amounts.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases (fraud detection, portfolio guidance) are mentioned but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are provided; excerpts are primarily risk/governance disclosures rather than product/strategy sections.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Excerpts include mdna and item_8 sections with substantive risk discussion; AI risk mechanisms (fraud enablement via AI, model risk from AI misuse) are described with operational specificity, but no quantification of risk exposure or named oversight body beyond cross-functional review procedures.
